title: What has she been seeking
wikitext:
[]: "What has she been seeking...?"             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Jul 15, 2007 2:28 pm Just something i've been pondering about from eva-commentary. Eoe, Maya types into her computer whilst everyone is being tanged around her. She says: â€œIs this the answer? What I've been seekingâ€¦?â€ Well, in Reichu's words: What has she been seeking?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jul 15, 2007 2:39 pm Her sempai!

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Jul 15, 2007 2:41 pm I could see why you'd say that, but she referes to it more as you would a 'thing' than a person.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jul 15, 2007 2:43 pm Yeah and Ritsuko appears right after she says that, well Lilith appears as Ritsuko anyways.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Jul 15, 2007 2:49 pm I don't know...it just seems too easy of an answer to me.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jul 15, 2007 3:01 pm What AEF said. It's lesbo love from her senpai that she wants.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 15, 2007 4:17 pm But it's before "Ritsuko" shows up. Maya is looking at the computer screen and talking about how everyone's A.T. Fields are disappearing. I'd guess it has something to do with that?

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Jul 15, 2007 4:27 pm That's exactly what I was thinking. Maybe she already had a vague idea of complementation.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 15, 2007 5:04 pm The words "I need you" appear on her screen appears AFTER Lilith as Rits types that in, right? So I guess that's out as what Maya has been seeking? :? Eitherway, I agree that Maya has been wanting (or should that be needing? ;)) love from her senpai. (See: Maya's implied Lesbianism throughout series (episode 17 comes to mind), her internalized homophobia earlier in 26' (Lilith passes through her..."ZOMG I DON'T WANNA BE GAY, IT'S TEH SUX!"), etc..)

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Jul 15, 2007 5:19 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: her internalized homophobia earlier in 26' (Lilith passes through her..."ZOMG I DON'T WANNA BE GAY, IT'S TEH SUX!"), etc..)

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Sun Jul 15, 2007 5:35 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: her internalized homophobia earlier in 26' (Lilith passes through her..."ZOMG I DON'T WANNA BE GAY, IT'S TEH SUX!"), etc..)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 15, 2007 7:55 pm Damn, re-reading that ANF thread (the "Maya getting fingered" take comes from FGC, at least where I was referencing that from) made me want to quote The Simpsons : Maya: You know, sir, I've always loved you... Ritsuko: Hmm? Maya: --In those colors! To self: Oh, who am I kidding? The boathouse was the time! Anyway, I'd say that Maya's being is Lesbian is more or less hinted throughout the series before its full-blown revelation in EoE. I guess either way it was included to show ALL the character's have problems, Maya's being that she still in the Closet as well as the fact she's in an unrequited love. :( (And hey, If Ritsuko doesn't want her, I'll take her; Maya's a total cutie! ) Though I wonder how Ritsuko would react to that? If she'd be disgusted/freaked out or simply wouldn't care/mind? The fact she's a scientist (knowing that sexual orientation is how people are born and not something that people "choose") would make me think Ritsuko would feel the later, but since Maya's "senpai" is portrayed as something of a coldhearted bitch ("Blah blah blah The pilots don't matter, fuck them, Only Eva matters, blah blah"), who knows? -_-

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Sun Jul 15, 2007 8:46 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Anyway, I'd say that Maya's being is Lesbian is more or less hinted throughout the series before its full-blown revelation in EoE. I guess either way it was included to show ALL the character's have problems, Maya's being that she still in the Closet as well as the fact she's in an unrequited love. :(

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jul 15, 2007 9:06 pm Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: (is it Senpai or Sempai [how would it even be Se m pai anyway?]?)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 15, 2007 9:20 pm there have been comments made in the past (by who?) about Maya being the audienceâ€™s link to the show *Be shocked at what she is shocked at!* *Throw up when she throws up!*

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Mon Jul 16, 2007 2:16 pm Reichu wrote: But it's before "Ritsuko" shows up. Maya is looking at the computer screen and talking about how everyone's A.T. Fields are disappearing. I'd guess it has something to do with that?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jul 16, 2007 2:50 pm Rawinder wrote: NERV's employees are well aware that their mission, upon defeating the Angels, is to initiate the HIP.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Oct 06, 2007 8:05 pm Ornette wrote: But it sounds like they don't know the details of the HIP (everyone turning into tang, 3I, etc).

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Oct 07, 2007 7:37 am Reichu wrote: But it's before "Ritsuko" shows up. Maya is looking at the computer screen and talking about how everyone's A.T. Fields are disappearing. I'd guess it has something to do with that?

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Oct 07, 2007 8:10 am It did at one point. There's quite a big theme of 'searching for the truth' in the Eva manga.
